audit_items.proof_trace: The guard at L362 (`if (s_auctionStarts[asset] == 0) revert InvalidAuction(asset)`) is unconditional and applies to every element of `endedAuctions` before `_onAuctionEnd` or any state mutation. No code path bypasses this check; `_onAuctionEnd` is `internal` and only reachable through this loop. The property holds on all execution paths.
